name: product_page_3_products_utility-beard-trimmer

observed_strengths.observation: Two FAQ-style H2 headings on PDP: 'Is the Beardbrand Utility Beard Trimmer Compatible with the Brio Zero Guard?' and 'What Is the Cutting Range?' — in-page SEO content targeting product-specific search queries
'Utility Beard Trimmer Reviews' section present — social proof integrated into PDP template
'Beardbrand Assurance' trust block (Returns, USA Shipping, International Shipping) present — consistent trust pattern across all PDPs

missing_or_weak.observation: Trimmer is a hardware/one-time purchase — no consumable cross-sell to beard oil, balm, or wash visible in page headings; natural grooming routine bundle not surfaced on trimmer PDP
CTA text 'Shop' / 'Shop All' only — actual 'Add to Cart' button text not captured in page structure extraction

purchase_path_notes: Trimmer is likely $99+ hardware. Post-purchase grooming kit upsell (beard oil + balm recommended for trimmer buyers) is a natural AOV play not visible on this PDP. The 'Still Looking?' section (if present here) would handle cross-sell.
